log: === INITIATIVE ===

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Tabaxi — Iron Concentration HP: 56/67

⚡ Tabaxi — Iron Concentration casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:10 total 20 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Tabaxi — Iron Concentration's turn ---
Tabaxi — Iron Concentration casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Tabaxi — Iron Concentration casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Tabaxi — Iron Concentration for 7. HP: 52/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Tabaxi — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 8 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away

--- Tabaxi — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Tabaxi — Iron Concentration loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
=== ROUND 4 ===

Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Tabaxi — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
